prerequisites: A registered Twelve Data account (sign up at twelvedata.com).
A personal API key retrieved from your Twelve Data account dashboard.
Optionally, the ticker symbol(s) you intend to pull (e.g. AAPL) and the interval, exchange, or country to scope the data.

authMethods.name: API Key
authMethods.summary: Twelve Data authenticates every request with an API key. Provide it in the connector's api_key field. The key is passed to the REST API (https://api.twelvedata.com) as the apikey query parameter, e.g. ?symbol=AAPL&apikey=your_api_key. A demo key (apikey=demo) exists for testing only; full and premium endpoints require your personal key.

setupSteps.title: Create a Twelve Data account
setupSteps.body: Register for an account on the Twelve Data website. An account is required before an API key can be issued.

setupSteps.title: Retrieve your API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in and open your Twelve Data dashboard. Locate your unique API key in the API keys section of the dashboard. This key authenticates all REST API requests.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the API key in the required api_key field. It is sent to https://api.twelvedata.com as the apikey query parameter on each request.

setupSteps.title: Configure the data scope (optional)
setupSteps.body: Set the optional symbol (ticker, e.g. AAPL), interval (time gap between data points such as 1min, 5min, or 1day), exchange (e.g. NASDAQ), and country (e.g. United States) fields to scope which instrument and market data are pulled. Leave them unset to use defaults.
